title: Missile strike
title_en: Missile strike
title_uk: Ракетний удар
description: Germany may be left without Tomahawk missiles as part of the reduction of the American contingent, - Reuters The USA canceled the deployment of a battalion with missiles in Germany. We are talking about the Pentagon's decision, which also provides for the withdrawal of one full brigade from the country and the rejection of plans to deploy long-range artillery in 2026. As the agency notes, these missiles were supposed to strengthen Moscow's deterrence,...
description_en: Germany may be left without Tomahawk missiles as part of the reduction of the American contingent, - Reuters The USA canceled the deployment of a battalion with missiles in Germany. We are talking about the Pentagon's decision, which also provides for the withdrawal of one full brigade from the country and the rejection of plans to deploy long-range artillery in 2026. As the agency notes, these missiles were supposed to strengthen Moscow's deterrence,...
description_uk: Германия может остаться без ракет Tomahawk в рамках сокращения американского контингента, - Reuters США отменили развертывание в Германии батальона с ракетами. Речь идет о решении Пентагона, которое также предусматривает вывод из страны одной полной бригады и отказ от планов разместить дальнобойную артиллерию в 2026 году. Как отмечает агентство, эти ракеты должны были усилить сдерживание москвы,...

title: Ukraine offers Finland a deal on drones, - Reuters Vladimir Zelensky...
title_en: Ukraine offers Finland a deal on drones, - Reuters Vladimir Zelensky...
title_uk: Україна пропонує Фінляндії угоду щодо безпілотників, - Reuters Володимир Зеленський...
description: Ukraine offers Finland a deal on drones, - Reuters Vladimir Zelensky offered Finland to strengthen the partnership between the two countries, signed an agreement on drones, and will also exchange technologies and combat experience accumulated during the four-year war with ₚossia. "Ukraine is ready to share its experience and strengthen those who supported us from the very beginning of the war," the Ukrainian leader said...
description_en: Ukraine offers Finland a deal on drones, - Reuters Vladimir Zelensky offered Finland to strengthen the partnership between the two countries, signed an agreement on drones, and will also exchange technologies and combat experience accumulated during the four-year war with ₚossia. "Ukraine is ready to share its experience and strengthen those who supported us from the very beginning of the war," the Ukrainian leader said...
description_uk: Украина предлагает Финляндии сделку по дронам, - Reuters Владимир Зеленский предложил Финляндии укрепить партнерство между двумя странами, подписав соглашение о беспилотниках, а также обменяться технологиями и боевым опытом, накопленным за четыре года войны с ₚоссией. "Украина готова поделиться своим опытом и укрепить тех, кто поддерживал нас с самого начала войны", - сказал украинский лидер...

title: Air defense active
title_en: Air defense active
title_uk: Активна ППО
description: Interception of a UAV of the Ukrainian Armed Forces by an anti-aircraft FPV drone yesterday in the Belgorod region. The enemy has spied on our practices and now also produces its own defenses against drones. RosSMY writes that for each downed drone, the MOG crew receives 1 million rubles. Crazy war of drones.
description_en: Interception of a UAV of the Ukrainian Armed Forces by an anti-aircraft FPV drone yesterday in the Belgorod region. The enemy has spied on our practices and now also produces its own defenses against drones. RosSMY writes that for each downed drone, the MOG crew receives 1 million rubles. Crazy war of drones.
description_uk: Перехват БПЛА ВСУ зенитным FPV-дроном вчера в Белгородской области. Враг подсмотрел наши практики и теперь тоже производит собственные защиты от беспилотников. РосСМИ пишут, что за каждый сбитый дрон экипаж МОГа получает 1 млн рублей. Безумная война дронов.

title: He met with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. We in...
title_en: He met with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. We in...
title_uk: Він зустрівся з прем'єр-міністром Великої Британії Кейром Стармером. Ми в...
description: He met with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. We in Ukraine appreciate all the steps taken by Great Britain to support our people and weaken the aggressor, in particular in the fight against the Russian shadow fleet. Talked about it today with Kir. Considerable attention was paid to defense support of Ukraine, in particular contributions to the PURL program. Ukraine is ready for the next round of negotiations in...
description_en: He met with the Prime Minister of Great Britain, Keir Starmer. We in Ukraine appreciate all the steps taken by Great Britain to support our people and weaken the aggressor, in particular in the fight against the Russian shadow fleet. Talked about it today with Kir. Considerable attention was paid to defense support of Ukraine, in particular contributions to the PURL program. Ukraine is ready for the next round of negotiations in...
description_uk: Зустрівся із Прем’єр-міністром Великої Британії Кіром Стармером. Ми в Україні цінуємо всі кроки Великої Британії для підтримки нашого народу та послаблення агресора, зокрема в боротьбі проти російського тіньового флоту. Говорили про це сьогодні з Кіром. Приділили значну увагу оборонній підтримці України, зокрема внескам у програму PURL. Україна готова до наступного раунду переговорів у...

title: 5 missiles intercepted
title_en: 5 missiles intercepted
title_uk: Перехоплено 5 ракет
description: 175 ENEMY UAVS AND 5 MISSILES WERE CUT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On May 3 (from 08:30 to 18:30), the enemy attacked with two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, five Kh-59/69 guided air missiles, as well as 234 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, "Parody" simulator drones and other types of drones. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile troops,...
description_en: 175 ENEMY UAVS AND 5 MISSILES WERE CUT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On May 3 (from 08:30 to 18:30), the enemy attacked with two Iskander-M ballistic missiles, five Kh-59/69 guided air missiles, as well as 234 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, "Parody" simulator drones and other types of drones. The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile troops,...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 175 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ТА 5 РАКЕТ ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ 3 травня (з 08.30 по 18:30) противник атакував двома балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М, п'ятьма керованими авіаційними ракетами Х-59/69, а також 234 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас, дронами-імітаторами «Пародія» та безпілотниками інших типів. Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська,...

title_uk: Виявлено запуск балістичної ракети
description: Met with Norwegian Prime Minister Jonas Har Stere in Yerevan. Thanked Norway for all the support for our country, in particular for contributions to the PURL program amounting to almost 1 billion dollars. Russia does not stop its strikes with ballistics, so timely filling of PURL is very important. We discussed our strategic partnership: Drone Deal and work on strengthening air defense, cooperation on...
description_en: Met with Norwegian Prime Minister Jonas Har Stere in Yerevan. Thanked Norway for all the support for our country, in particular for contributions to the PURL program amounting to almost 1 billion dollars. Russia does not stop its strikes with ballistics, so timely filling of PURL is very important. We discussed our strategic partnership: Drone Deal and work on strengthening air defense, cooperation on...
description_uk: Зустрівся з Прем’єр-міністром Норвегії Йонасом Гаром Стере в Єревані. Подякував Норвегії за всю підтримку для нашої країни, зокрема за внески у програму PURL на суму майже 1 мільярд доларів. Росія не зупиняє своїх ударів балістикою, тому своєчасне наповнення PURL дуже важливе. Ми обговорили наше стратегічне партнерство: Drone Deal та роботу над посиленням протиповітряної оборони, співпрацю на...

title: How drone warfare is changing war reporting In the latest episode of...

title_uk: Як війна безпілотників змінює репортаж про війну В останньому епізоді...
description: How drone warfare is changing war reporting In the latest episode of Ukraine This Week, Anna Belokur examines why war reporting is becoming more dangerous in Ukraine. As drone warfare expands across the country, journalists are increasingly exposed to risks far beyond the front line. With these new dangers, questions have emerged about how best to protect themselves and whether journalists should...
